_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Strategy involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy formulation methods, alignment with enterprise business strategy, competitive positioning through data capabilities, and strategy communication frameworks.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.476), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.468).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.300). Shared vocabulary: [strategy]. DDaT-only terms [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.881, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DDaT element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Strategy involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's objectives" and "Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.560 > STS 0.300 (gap +0.260). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [strategy] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Shared tokens: [strategy]. DDaT-only: [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan]. WIDAI-only: [ai, alignment, approaches, business, capabilities, communication].
